artifacts.title: Economy receipt from 2023-12-21
artifacts.excerpt:
After speaking with a Fin, I'm increasingly convinced that there is a reason Finland is constantly rated among the happiest (if not THE happiest) countries on Earth.

What is the reason? 

The Cooperative Economy.

What is a co-op? And why do they matter?

I'm glad you asked! 🧵

artifacts.title: Economy receipt from 2024-05-27
artifacts.excerpt:
The “Cottage Core” Economy

The cottage core economy is a new way of organizing a local economy within a neighborhood or village. It focuses on people working together to manage and share resources like food, water, and other essentials. The main goal is to create a more…

artifacts.title: Could receipt from 2022-12-30
artifacts.excerpt:
As a former bank engineer, I am continually animated by a vision of non-market financial services rooted in care and reciprocity.

What if you could securely store individual and collective wealth without the threat of commercial profit-seeking?

We pay banks to lose our money.

🌱

planets.name: Here
planets.summary: Archive cluster around here: 79 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Here receipt from 2023-03-13
artifacts.excerpt:
The Commons is.

Soil, water, and sky,
the foundation of life and a home for humanity.

Perceived in part - but invisible as a whole; 
it is here, there, and everywhere.

Everything is born from it, and everything returns to it;
it is past, present, and future. 

The Commons is.
